summary.intent: Address Codex review findings on PR #665 (fogodev/ars-ui) for Listbox and Select components, specifically fixing selection behavior, aria-describedby wiring, and SelectAll logic, then get CI and Codex approval.
summary.outcome: All five original review threads were resolved with commit ba6303bf, then a second round of four Codex P1/P2 issues on Select were fixed (trigger/clear button attrs, keydown double-toggle, blur-then-click option selection) and pushed with updated snapshots; CI passed and the snapshot-reviewed label was applied.

repo: Listbox and Select share a `selection_behavior` enum (`Replace` vs `Toggle`); `on_item_click` must dispatch `SelectItem` vs `ToggleItem` based on that value.
Select multi-select toggling should only occur when `selection_behavior` is `Toggle`; replace mode uses `selection_state.select` directly.
Both Listbox and Select expose `SetDescriptionPresent` plus `Api::on_description_present` to wire `aria-describedby`.
Listbox `SelectAll` uses `Set::All` when no disabled keys exist, but materializes concrete enabled-key sets when disabled keys are present to preserve disabled-selection invariants.
Snapshots in `crates/ars-components/src/selection/select/snapshots/` must be accepted with `cargo insta accept` after behavior changes; the `snapshot-reviewed` PR label is applied manually post-push.

code.finding: trigger_attrs and clear_trigger_attrs section; tightened to avoid double-toggle on Enter keydown
on_trigger_keydown Enter path inspected for double-toggle issue
Blur-then-click option selection path; fixed to allow stale blur before click to still register selection

workflow: Codex review is triggered by commenting `@codex review` on the PR via `gh pr comment`.
Review threads are resolved via GraphQL `resolveReviewThread` mutation using thread IDs from the `reviewThreads` query.
CI polling pattern: `sleep N && gh pr checks` with concurrent reactions and unresolved-threads queries to batch status checks.
Snapshot updates require two passes: run tests (they fail/update), then `cargo insta accept`, then re-run full suite to confirm clean.

The full local gate is: `cargo +nightly fmt --all --check && cargo test -p ars-components selection && PROPTEST_CASES=256 cargo test ... --ignored && cargo check --features i18n && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`.

friction: Snapshot acceptance required multiple cycles: tests failed to produce new snapshots, then `cargo insta accept` was needed before the suite would pass cleanly.
CI polling required manual sleep-and-recheck loops (240s, 360s waits) with no integrated notification, making status tracking tedious.
A second wave of Codex findings arrived after the first five threads were resolved, requiring another full fix-test-push cycle.
open_items: Verify Codex produces no further P1/P2 findings after the second push (blur-click and double-toggle fixes were not yet confirmed clean by Codex at session end).
PR merge pending final CI green and any remaining Codex sign-off.
